summary: Completed testing of Speechcue SIP Test Page iteration 3. Referral system (bonus calls for referrals) exists in code but cannot be fully tested without Telegram bot interaction.

SIP guide in phone-config.js (line 592) correctly mentions /testsip
Referral system logic exists in phone-test-routes.js (getOrCreateReferralCode, trackReferral functions)
Telegram bot handler for /testsip with referral link generation exists in _index.js (lines 3883-3901)
test_credentials: N/A - OTP required from Telegram bot @Nomadlybot via /testsip command
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features verified: (1) /testsip command renamed from /test - confirmed in phone-config.js line 592 and _index.js line 3884 (2) SipTest.js deleted - confirmed file does not exist (3) Old /api/sip-test-credentials endpoint removed - returns 404 (4) Error messages reference /testsip - confirmed in verify-otp response (5) Frontend shows /testsip in instructions - confirmed via Playwright test. Referral system exists in code (phone-test-routes.js) but requires Telegram bot interaction to fully test the bonus call crediting flow.
